calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Off Calendar

Quiet Title In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Judgment-Quieting Title Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Matthew Henderson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Marcia Keefe, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: G. Gregory Williams and All Persons Unknow claiming any legal right, title, estate, lien, or interest in the property located at 1980 Sutter St., #302, San Francisco.
Quieting Title.
Judgment signed in open court, see detail in scanned doc.
